utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now compare with the final plan: it includes health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget — so 5 items appear. Next, check if each is fully specified with all required details: (1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists 'LifeFirst Standard Plan - €100/month' for physical and '€65/month' for mental — costs are present, so this is fully specified. (2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan lists 'EliteHome Premium Coverage: €95/month (with €200,000 limit)' — includes a plan name, cost, and limit; this satisfies costs and indicates coverage; considered fully specified. (3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan lists 'LifeFirst Standard Plan - €50/month' — cost included, so fully specified. (4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. Multiple services each with costs are provided — fully specified. (5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan only provides '€525/month' with no annual figure. Since the format says 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown', the annual cost is missing, so this is not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes specific items that must be matched to the ground-truth rating list. The items present are: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, EliteHome Premium Coverage for home content, LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel insurance, and three property enhancement services: Smart Home Integration, Home Maintenance Program, Emergency Response Service, plus Gaming Equipment Coverage. From the ground truth: LifeFirst Standard Plan has rating 8 for both physical health and mental health; EliteHome Premium Coverage has rating 10 under home_content; LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel insurance has rating 7; Smart Home Integration has rating 8; Home Maintenance Program has rating 6; Emergency Response Service has rating 7; Gaming Equipment Coverage has rating 3.
